channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A tale of two parties: Trump and Mamdani test political influence as four states hold primaries
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani and President Trump put their political clout on the line as New York, South Carolina, Maryland and Utah hold key primaries.

item.title: Federal judge dismisses Trump lawsuit over Los Angeles sanctuary policies
item.description: A federal judge on Monday dismissed the Trump administration's lawsuit challenging Los Angeles' immigration policies, Reuters reported.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Rosie O'Donnell's Kimmel appearance shows late night is stuck on repeat
'Poetica' Justice: What a woke NYC coffee shop told a Jewish congressman now has the DOJ's attention
